---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for ssh-auth as a Codex remote development profile switcher
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What Codex remote development workflow is currently harder than it should be?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the change you want.

## Example workflow

```shell
ssh-auth list
ssh-auth switch 02
ssh-auth check
```

## Why this belongs in ssh-auth

Explain how this improves managing SSH profiles for Codex, the stable `codex-active` alias, or profile switching/checking.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workaround or existing SSH/OpenSSH behavior you already tried.

## Security and privacy expectations

Note any data that must not be stored or printed, especially passwords, keys, hostnames, usernames, or ports.
